ogTitle: Ramornie vs Ramsgate Beach: Climate Safety

heading: Ramornie vs Ramsgate Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ramornie, New South Wales and Ramsgate Beach, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ramornie has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Ramsgate Beach (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ramornie or Ramsgate Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ramornie has a flood risk score of 60/100, while Ramsgate Beach scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ramornie scores 42/100 for bushfire risk. Ramsgate Beach scores 46/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ramornie or Ramsgate Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ramornie has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
